mapper.select: SELECT MAX(item_code) FROM pr_expense_item WHERE item_group = #{itemGroup} AND org_id = #{orgId}

SELECT id, item_code, item_name, item_group, is_show, is_printmonth, price_precision, qty_precision, money_precision, is_integer, precision_type, start_pos, sum_precision, change_cycle, org_id, company_id, create_by, create_time FROM pr_expense_item WHERE id = #{id}
